metadata.title: Suspicious Minds
metadata.album: Bossa Nova Baby: The Ultimate Elvis Presley Party Album
metadata.lyrics:
[00:05.49] We're caught in a trap
[00:09.48] I can't walk out
[00:13.65] Because I love you too much, baby
[00:19.72] 
[00:22.24] Why can't you see
[00:25.91] What you're doing to me
[00:30.15] When you don't believe a word I say?
[00:34.78] 
[00:39.01] We can't go on together
[00:42.88] With suspicious minds (suspicious minds)
[00:46.96] And we can't build our dreams
[00:51.18] On suspicious minds
[00:54.94] So if an old friend I know
[00:59.18] Stops by to say hello
[01:03.52] Would I still see suspicion in your eyes?
[01:11.86] Here we go again
[01:15.96] Asking where I've been
[01:20.51] You can't see the tears are real, I'm crying
[01:24.85] (Yes I'm crying)
[01:28.25] We can't go on together
[01:32.43] With suspicious minds (suspicious minds)
[01:36.58] And we can't build our dreams
[01:40.74] On suspicious minds
[01:46.59] Oh, let our love survive
[01:51.32] I'll dry the tears from your eyes
[01:56.44] Let's don't let a good thing die
[02:01.38] When honey, you know I've never lied to you
[02:07.35] Hum (ye, ye)
